topic: wine cooperative shared resources and market access
trigger_keywords: principal ventaja de una cooperativa vinícola para sus socios viticultores
acceder a equipamiento de vinificación y canales de comercialización sin la inversión individual

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Grower members pool grapes, capital, and organizational resources through a wine cooperative.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: The cooperative spreads winery equipment, technical staff, processing, packaging, and marketing costs across multiple members.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Individual growers can access winemaking infrastructure and distribution channels without funding the full investment alone.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: A cooperative pools resources so members share costly production infrastructure and obtain collective routes to market.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
